title: Warmiehomy 30cm Christmas Wreath For Front Door, Christmas Decorations Door Wreath Christmas Garland with Pine Cones and Snow Spray For Xmas New Year Home Decoration
features: HIGH QUALITY - The Christmas wreath made of simulated rattan and artificial pine cones and fake snow which realistic and durable to use. Environmental friendly material, can be reuse for years.

FULL OF FESTIVAL ATMOSPHERE - In order to welcome the coming Christmas and New Year, a full of festival feeling wreath decoration is necessary. Artificial pine cones and fake snow make the garland more lovely and fabulous.

WIDELY USEAGE - Perfect for wall, front door, fireplace, living room, bedroom, dining room, backyard, home, office, party, cafe, pub, bistro decoration. Suitable for domestic and commercial use, holiday and daily use.
IDEAL GIFT - It is an ideal Christmas and New Year gift for your family and friends! Bring you and your family good luck in the next year!
LOVELY DECOR - Green leaves matches well with artificial pine cones and fake snow, will make Christmas and New Year more warm and celebrate family gathering!
